name: Five-Layer Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the dark and white chocolates separately over a double boiler.
2. When thoroughly dissolved, add the heavy cream to the melted white chocolate. Whisk continuously; if lumps form, briefly return the mixture to the double boiler until smooth.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy. Gradually add sugar and vanilla extract, then incorporate eggs one at a time.
4. Blend in the sour cream.
5. Divide the batter into two bowls. To one, add the dark chocolate; to the other, add the white chocolate.
6. Pour the white chocolate mixture evenly into prepared pans.
7. Spread the dark chocolate on top of the white layer without mixing the two layers.
8. Bake at 350°F for 60 to 70 minutes, or until firm.
9. Turn off the oven and leave the door slightly ajar. Allow to cool for 1 hour before serving.
